meaning: adj.恶毒的,凶恶的,极恶的,重罪的
examples: He carry out a felonious act.
He carried out a felonious act.
An activity that may be considered illegal, questionable, or a vice, but not felonious.
Mr. McGinty cited possible charges including felonious assault, attempted murder and the killing of an unborn fetus.
Simply tune into any news program these days, and financial frauds appear more commonplace than felonious assaults.
